long-title: Teachers and social workers not trained in health literacy

content: The social work regulation authority (Social Work England)

sections.long-title: What are the causes of the problem?
content: Lack of awareness of the need for health literacy in traning for teaching and social work professionals

sections.long-title: What actions are involved in doing something about this?
How will we deliver these actions?
content: Meeting with key people (ministers, civil servants, regulatory bodies)

sections.long-title: What do we expect to come out of these actions?
content: Health literacy training embedded in health and public health professional training

sections.long-title: How will we know things have changed?
content: Health literacy will appear in teaching and social work training

sections.long-title: What short term changes will we see?
What do we think will happen in the longer term (3 years)? For example, increased health literacy, better disease control, improved health
content: More teaching and p;ublic health professions will be starting to learn about health literacy as they train

sections.long-title: What are the current activities in this area?
